title: Chapter 1658 Dragon God’s Descendant
content:
Chapter 1658 Dragon God's Descendant

Yuan and Long Yejun silently stared at each other, seeming waiting for the other to act first.

"If you're not going to move first, then allow me to!" Long Yejun suddenly began transforming. His aura erupted like a volcano, and scales began appearing all over his body.

Furthermore, a golden mask that was shaped like a dragon's face materialized on Long Yejun's face, giving him a fearsome presence.

Seeing this, Yuan used God of War's Astral Arts, but he restricted the avatar's size to be only slightly larger than his own body.

"What is that...?" Long Yejun murmured, staring at the avatar with awe and intrigue, as he'd never seen a technique like that before.

It was not just Long Yejun. The onlookers were also baffled by God of War's Astral Arts, a unique technique unlike anything they've seen before.

"Why are you just standing there? Let's go!" Yuan made the first move a moment later when Long Yejun only stood there in silence.

Long Yejun quickly snapped out of his daze to block Yuan's strike before countering with his own.

Long Yejun's speed and power had significantly increased since his transformation. As for Yuan, not only did he become stronger, but he also grew another pair of arms, allowing him to attack more frequently.

After their power-up, each of their punches and kicks would create powerful windstorms and cause violent earthquakes.

"What is going on here?" A new onlooker showed up after being attracted by the commotion.

"Princess Meihui!" The others bowed to her after recognizing her.

"The Dragon Prince is currently sparring with the fourth Dragon God Descendant." Someone filled her in on the situation.

"Huh? My brother? And what do you mean fourth Dragon God Descendant?" Dragon Princess Meihui raised her eyebrows in a puzzled manner. This was her first time hearing this news.

"You haven't heard? This person managed to reach the second floor of the Divine Dragon Council, and when his bloodline was tested, it was revealed he had the Dragon God's blood within him. It's been spreading around like crazy."

"This is my first time hearing about it." Princess Meihui shook her head.

She narrowed her focus at the figure fighting with her brother, Long Yejun. When she saw Yuan's face and recognized him, her eyes widened with shock.

"He's the fourth Dragon God Descendant?! No way!" she exclaimed.

"What? You know him?" "We've met and even spoken very recently. However, I can't say that I know him. To think he'd have Dragon God's blood in him… what kind of coincidence is this?" Princess Meihui sighed out loud.

"It's just a rumor for now since they haven't confirmed if he is truly the Dragon God's fourth descendant."

Princess Meihui shook her head and said, "It's likely true since I felt a strange connection with him when we first met. Although it was subtle, it was still there. I didn't think much of it back then and even ignored it."

"No way… so he might really be the fourth Dragon God's Descendant?" The others were speechless.

In the Divine Dragon Sanctuary, those who were affiliated followed a strict ranking structure. This hierarchy determined not only status but also privileges and responsibilities, with higher-ranked individuals holding greater authority and access to powerful resources, while the lower ranks strove to prove themselves worthy of advancement.

The majority of affiliates within the Divine Dragon Sanctuary do not possess a rank, making even the lowest rank a position of immense authority.

The lowest rank within the Divine Dragon Sanctuary was the Divine Dragon Warrior, entrusted with maintaining order within the territory. They also served as the first line of defense and enforcers of the territory's peace.

Above them were the Divine Dragon Commanders, responsible for leading and directing the Divine Dragon Warriors. They were akin to generals in the military. Only a hundred Divine Dragon Commanders existed in the Divine Dragon Sanctuary, while hundreds of thousands of Divine Dragon Warriors exist.

The next and highest attainable rank was the Divine Dragon Council. Comprised of fewer than a dozen individuals, the members of the council wielded the greatest authority within the Divine Dragon Sanctuary, second only to the Dragon God and his descendants. They were entrusted with making crucial decisions and overseeing the sanctuary's most important matters.

Although the Divine Dragon Council was the highest rank, there was a rank even higher than them, reserved only for the Dragon God's offspring—the Dragon God's Descendants.

"Has the Dragon God commented on the situation?" Princess Meihui asked the ones around her.

"No, but the Dragon God should have been notified already."

Meihui looked toward the sky and mumbled, "Father…"

Yuan and Long Yejun continued their battle for two days straight without a moment of rest. Both had long forgotten about the assessment, fully absorbed in the thrill of the fight, pushing each other to their limits as they exchanged relentless blows. Neither seemed willing to back down, their stamina and determination seemingly boundless.

"You're really something, Yuan! I haven't been entertained to this extent in a very long time! However, I can tell that you're still holding back! Show me everything you've got!" "Are you sure? Don't complain if you get hurt!"

"Hahaha! Of course! I won't complain even if you kill me by accident!" Long Yejun laughed out loud.

"Then allow me to show you my true strength!"

Yuan's aura suddenly surged, transforming into something more refined and razor-sharp, resembling the cutting edge of a sword.

Long Yejun halted his movement and even subconsciously backed away from Yuan after sensing his Enhanced Sword Aura.

"What is that power...?" Long Yejun muttered in astonishment

Everyone watching was equally bewildered by Yuan's Sword Aura. The sharp, otherworldly energy left them in awe, unable to comprehend its origin or nature.

"I am not done yet."

After releasing his Enhanced Sword Aura, Yuan imbued it with his Chaotic Essence.

BOOM!

The Sword Aura instantly intensified several times, almost reaching the realm of Supreme Sword Aura in terms of prowess.
